title: E1: SessionStart hook knowledge-hint-broad.cjs
description: Implement SessionStart hook knowledge-hint-broad.cjs. Invokes `fabric plan-context-hint --all`, parses stdout JSON, renders human-readable summary to stderr. ≤30 entries → full listing (one line per entry, grouped by type). >30 entries → grouped truncation (per type: list proven headers + verified id list + draft count only). Renders for SessionStart event across Claude Code / Cursor / Codex configs. Anchor: handoff.json#acceptance_criteria for E1.

files.change: SessionStart hook script: invoke fabric plan-context-hint --all; parse stdout JSON; emit rendered summary to stderr
Add knowledge-hint-broad.cjs to SessionStart hook list
Add knowledge-hint-broad.cjs to SessionStart hook list (Codex-CLI naming)
Add knowledge-hint-broad.cjs to SessionStart hook list (Cursor naming)

implementation: Create knowledge-hint-broad.cjs with shebang + Node CommonJS
Spawn child process: `fabric plan-context-hint --all` (use cross-platform child_process.spawnSync)
Parse stdout as JSON (validate version field)

Render logic: if entries.length <= 30 → group by type; for each type, emit one line per entry: `[id] (type/maturity) summary` to stderr; if > 30 → for each type, emit proven full + verified id list (no body) + draft count only
Always emit at end of rendering: revision_hash for cache-correctness reference (used by E3)
Register hook in all three client configs (SessionStart event)
Smoke test: simulate SessionStart event; verify stderr output is well-formed and bounded by terminal width

reference.pattern: Hook script invoking CLI subcommand + stderr rendering
reference.examples: Mirror fabric-hint.cjs spawn pattern + stderr emit

criteria: knowledge-hint-broad.cjs registered as SessionStart hook in all three client configs
knowledge-hint-broad.cjs invokes `fabric plan-context-hint --all`, parses JSON stdout, renders stderr summary
Rendering rule: ≤30 entries → full per-type listing (one line each); >30 entries → grouped truncation (proven full / verified id-list / draft count-only)
Hook exits 0; no stdout pollution; stderr output bounded by terminal width

rationale.chosen_approach: Spawn CLI subcommand (decoupled from server runtime); stderr rendering keeps stdout clean for harness
alternatives_considered: Direct HTTP call to fabric serve
decision_factors: Hook runs without node_modules guarantee — CLI binary is the contract
stderr is harness-conventional for hint output
rationale.tradeoffs: ~100ms process startup per session; acceptable for SessionStart cadence

manual_checks: Run knowledge-hint-broad.cjs manually with seeded KB (5 entries) → verify ≤30 full listing
Run with 50-entry KB → verify grouped truncation
Run in fresh repo with empty KB → verify graceful zero-output or minimal stderr
success_metrics: 3 rendering modes verified (≤30 full, >30 truncated, empty)

risks.description: CLI process unavailable in sandboxed harness
risks.mitigation: Detect and emit one-line install hint if `fabric` not on PATH
